summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 0 warning, 1 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: - `test/flows.test.mjs:247,255,267,276,286,312` — covers all three severity branches, non-simplicity 🔴 (no veto leakage), mixed-severity per-line labeling, and FAIL-verdict propagation.

Summary: The `mergeReviewFindings` change at `bin/lib/flows.mjs:188` is a pure presentation-layer label rewrite. `f.role` comes from the internal `PARALLEL_REVIEW_ROLES` allow-list and `p.severity` is the same parsed value used as the sort key — no untrusted-input vector. The FAIL verdict downstream keys off the 🔴 emoji, not the `[simplicity veto]` label, so the relabel cannot be abused to bypass or forge gate decisions (verified by `test/flows.test.mjs:312-324`). No secrets, no ReDoS surface, safe default fallback to `f.role`. Test artifact confirms `pass 544 / fail 0`.
